name: Midpoint Holdings Ltd.
description: Midpoint Holdings Ltd. is a financial services company that provides international payment and peer-to-peer foreign exchange services to both individual and corporate customers. As a pioneer in the industry, the company developed a dedicated peer-to-peer international foreign currency matching platform designed to facilitate cross-border transactions. While the company has maintained operational headquarters in the United Kingdom, it is incorporated in Canada and listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol MPT. The firm specializes in streamlining global currency exchange through its patented matching technology, serving a diverse range of clients worldwide.
